claim: All 15 phases have one final allowed verdict with separate first-order and second-order classifications; refinement set 003, 006, 007, 010, 011, 012, 013, 016; no invalidations.
HEAD is 211 commits after baseline; 29 commits touch the active deep-loop skill or packet 036 and 182 touch neither target surface.
Phase 003 reproduces the required renamed-path and zero-match underscored-glob controls, while phase 004 remains the clean negative control.
Packet 033 survives as archived packet 027 for provenance; active benchmark execution uses the shared runner and kebab-case per-mode packages.

Seven public modes, five implementation families, three improvement variants, and eight migration workstreams are distinct; the three named routing commits changed semantics but not registered-mode count.
